introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Los Angeles, The Azizi Firm is here to help. With millions of vehicles on LA's roads daily, accidents are an unfortunate reality. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Los Angeles car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions, T-bone accidents, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents (which are unfortunately common in LA), drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and multi-vehicle pileups on congested freeways.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Los Angeles
sections.body: The heavy traffic on LA freeways (405, 101, 5, 10, 110, 710, 605) leads to frequent accidents caused by distracted driving, aggressive lane changes, speeding, drunk driving, reckless driving during traffic surges, tailgating, fatigued commercial drivers, and unsafe lane splitting by motorcyclists. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties and insurance coverage.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Los Angeles?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention even if you feel fine, document the scene with photos and videos capturing traffic and road conditions, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contact info, report the accident to LAPD or CHP, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance adjusters.

faq.question: How much is my Los Angeles car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, future earning capacity, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage including uninsured/underinsured motorist coverage. LA juries have a history of significant verdicts in serious injury cases. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We know how LA insurance adjusters operate and use this experience to maximize your recovery. We won't let insurance companies take advantage of you.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Los Angeles, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
